name: White Perch in Beer Batter
recipeIngredient: 4 White perch, scaled and sprinkled inside and out
recipeInstructions:
Mix the flour, cornmeal, dill weed or tarragon, salt, and paprika in a bowl.
Add the beer and beat until smooth.
Dip the fish in the beer batter one at a time.
Heat the lard in an iron skillet.
Sauté the fish for 8-9 minutes on each side.
